description_long: A generously sized hamburger sits atop a white plate with a black rim, accompanied by thick potato wedges, a serving of creamy coleslaw, and a portion of reddish-brown sauce or grilled vegetable. The hamburger features a golden-brown sesame seed bun, with the top bun slightly askew, revealing layers of fresh green lettuce, a slice of tomato, a thick beef patty, melted white cheese, and possibly a slice of bacon or grilled onion. The patty appears juicy and well-cooked, with the cheese melted over its edge. The lettuce is crisp and abundant, spilling out from the sides, while the tomato and other toppings are stacked neatly beneath the cheese. The potato wedges are golden and rustic, with a slightly rough texture, and the coleslaw is creamy with visible shreds of cabbage and carrot. The overall presentation is hearty and appetizing, suitable for a casual meal in an urban park or street food setting.
description: A hearty hamburger with a sesame seed bun, melted cheese, lettuce, tomato, and a beef patty, served on a plate with potato wedges and coleslaw. The presentation is rustic and appetizing.
description_view_0: The hamburger is seen from the side, with the top bun covering most of the fillings and potato wedges visible around the plate.
description_view_1: This angle reveals more of the potato wedges and a portion of reddish-brown sauce or grilled vegetable next to the burger.
description_view_2: The front of the hamburger is visible, showing the melted cheese, lettuce, tomato, and a clear view of the coleslaw and sauce on the plate.
description_view_3: A close view of the lettuce and cheese spilling out from the bun, with the coleslaw and sauce more prominent on the left side of the plate.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce is layered directly above the bottom bun, followed by tomato, a beef patty, and melted cheese on top. The toppings are stacked neatly, with lettuce and cheese spilling out from the sides.
